title: Policy
description: Policy aggregate parent row (mutable state + denormalized account context + lifecycle stamps). Immutable term / coverage history lives in PolicyVersion and PolicyCoverageLine rows. See ADR-018 and F0018.

policyNumber.description: Human-readable policy identifier in the format NEB-{LOB-prefix}-{yyyy}-{6-digit-sequence}. Server-assigned at create; immutable.

carrierId.description: Reference to CarrierRef seed. Immutable post-issue.

boundAt.description: When the policy transitioned from Pending to Issued.

issuedAt.description: Alias for boundAt; retained for downstream clarity.

reinstatementDeadline.description: Computed at cancellation time as CancellationEffectiveDate + LOB.reinstatementWindowDays. Null when not in Cancelled state or when reinstatement is no longer possible.

predecessorPolicyId.description: Set at create when this policy renews an Expired or Cancelled predecessor on the same account. Immutable post-create in MVP.

successorPolicyId.description: Computed at read time from F0007 Renewal.BoundPolicyId where Renewal.PolicyId = this.Id. Never persisted.

currentVersionId.description: Points to the immutable PolicyVersion snapshot representing the current in-force terms.

currentLobAttributes.description: Current policy-stage product attributes resolved from CurrentVersionId -> PolicyVersion; not an independent Policy write source.

versionCount.description: Monotonic count of PolicyVersion rows for this policy.

totalPremium.description: Sum of coverage-line premiums under the current version.

premiumCurrency.description: MVP is USD-only. Multi-currency is a follow-up.

importSource.description: How this policy entered Nebula. Set at create; immutable.

externalPolicyReference.description: External carrier / source reference preserved for imports.

accountDisplayNameAtLink.description: Denormalized account display name captured at policy create per ADR-017 fallback contract.

accountStatusAtRead.description: Current account status at read time per ADR-017 fallback contract.

accountSurvivorId.description: When the linked account is Merged, the survivor account id per ADR-017.

availableTransitions.description: Lifecycle transitions available to the authenticated user given current state and role.
